## Summary

What changed?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI change
- [ ] Packaging/build change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Safety/permissions change

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Default read-only behavior preserved
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No personal runtime data committed
- [ ] World-changing actions still go through permissions
- [ ] Failure cases are readable

## Testing

Commands run:

```bash
npm run check
npm start
```

Manual tests performed:

- [ ] App launch
- [ ] Minecraft connection
- [ ] Core command
- [ ] Memory
- [ ] Permissions
- [ ] Packaging
